title: Backend: fix portfoliomodels list_test.go DTO drift
ac: `cd backend && go vet ./...` exits 0 from a clean checkout
`cd backend && go test ./internal/portfoliomodels/...` passes against the dev test DB

title: DB: delete residual 097_DOWN row from schema_migrations
ac: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schema_migrations WHERE filename LIKE '%DOWN%'` returns 0 on dev
`docs/c_c_postgresql_migrations.md` records the cleanup with date and rationale
`go run ./backend/cmd/migrate -env backend/.env.dev -db vector -dry-run` reports `up to date`

title: Migrations: append missing COMMIT to 4 forward migrations
ac: All 4 files end with a non-comment `COMMIT;` line
`go run ./backend/cmd/migrate -env backend/.env.dev -dry-run` reports `up to date` for both DBs

title: Migrations: document the 027 numbering gap in c_c_postgresql_migrations.md
ac: the note links to the git commit that removed the original 027 file
any doc-link checker (manual `grep -r 'c_c_postgresql_migrations'`) shows the doc still resolves

title: Migrations: create symmetric db/library_schema/down/ with README
ac: `go run ./backend/cmd/migrate -env backend/.env.dev -db library -dry-run` still reports `up to date`

title: Backend: delete 5 unused exported Go functions
ac: `grep -rn 'ValidateName\|ValidateKind\|IsPAdmin\|ParseEntityKey' backend/` returns only the function-definition lines (no call sites)

title: Backend: audit OLLAMA_URL/OLLAMA_MODEL — wire to .env.dev or remove
ac: Either `backend/.env.dev` carries both vars with explicit values, OR `backend/cmd/server/main.go` no longer references them
`go run ./backend/cmd/server -env backend/.env.dev` boots without warnings about missing Ollama config

title: Frontend: npm update marked patch bump
ac: `package.json` shows `marked` resolved to the latest 18.x patch in `package-lock.json`
`npm run build` exits 0 with no new warnings

title: Repo: commit untracked migration + DOWN README
ac: `git status --short db/` shows no untracked files
the commit message references the PLA-0006 backfill and the down/ relocation
`go run ./backend/cmd/migrate -env backend/.env.dev -db vector -dry-run` reports `up to date`

title: Frontend: migrate 3 direct fetch() calls onto api() helper
ac: all 3 listed sites import and use `api()` from `app/lib/api.ts`
force a stale-token scenario and confirm the addressables snapshot still loads after the silent refresh

title: Frontend: sweep inline style={{...}} violations to zero
ac: `docs/css-guide.md` and `globals.css` contain the new utility/variant classes added during the sweep
manual smoke of `/topology`, `/work-items`, `/theme` shows no visual regression

title: Backend: reset test DB tier to migration tip
ac: `SELECT MAX(filename) FROM schema_migrations` on the test DB matches the highest file in `db/schema/`
`cd backend && go test ./...` shows zero `column does not exist` errors
`docs/c_postgresql.md` (or new leaf) explains where the test DB lives and how to reset it

title: Backend: make test-db-reset target + doc
ac: `make test-db-reset` (or the documented script) drops the test DB, re-creates it, and runs all migrations idempotently
running it twice in a row leaves the DB in the same state both times
`docs/c_postgresql.md` (or a new test-DB leaf) describes when and how to run it

title: DB: capture 233-index audit as tech-debt entry with observation window
ac: `docs/c_tech_debt.md` has a Severity-3 entry naming the 233 indexes, the observation-window end date, and the trigger condition for action
the entry links to (or embeds) the full list of indexes by name
the observation-window end date is set ~1 sprint out and recorded in the entry
